root.speaker: Lirien's Apprentice
root.text:
You came up here? Few do. Lirien is below, with the
Sigilkeep. I keep the instruments clean.

what.speaker: Lirien's Apprentice
what.text:
Astrolabe — for the slow walkers. Quadrant — for the
one that does not move. Ruler — it knows the realm
has a curve to it.

curve.speaker: Lirien's Apprentice
curve.text: A small one. Most cannot feel it. Some instruments can.

where.speaker: Lirien's Apprentice
where.text:
Sigilkeep, originally. Wandered up. The air here is
different — drier, older.

props.message:
Astrolabe. Quadrant.

A ruler that knows the realm's curve.

Everything set parallel, square, true. Even the dust
seems to land in rows.

A clean desk under a slanted skylight. Brass instruments
rest in their cradles, each catching its own slice of star.
